name: Nextcloud Attachments
author: Bulwark Mail Community
description: Attach large files via a Nextcloud share link instead of as binary attachments. Each user authenticates with their own Nextcloud app password; files are uploaded over WebDAV and a public share link is appended to the outgoing message at send time.

ncUrl.label: Nextcloud server URL
ncUrl.description: Full URL of your Nextcloud instance, e.g. https://cloud.example.com. The origin must also be listed in the plugin's httpOrigins (manifest) and the Nextcloud server must serve CORS headers permitting this webmail's origin.

ncAppPassword.label: Nextcloud app password
ncAppPassword.description: Generate one in Nextcloud → Settings → Security → Devices & sessions. Stored unencrypted in this browser; do not share this profile.

ncBaseFolder.label: Upload folder
ncBaseFolder.description: Path inside your Nextcloud home where uploads land. Created on demand.

ncFolderLayout.label: Folder layout
ncFolderLayout.description: How uploads are organised inside the upload folder.

expiryDays.label: Share expiry (days)
expiryDays.description: Number of days the public share link stays valid. 0 disables expiry.

passwordProtect.label: Password-protect share links
passwordProtect.description: Generate a random password for each share. The password is shown next to the link in the email body so the recipient can copy it.

sizeThreshold.label: Cloud-attach hint threshold (bytes)
sizeThreshold.description: Regular attachments above this size produce a hint suggesting cloud attach. Default 10 MB.

nudgeOnLargeUpload.label: Suggest cloud attach for large files
nudgeOnLargeUpload.description: Show a toast hint when a regular attachment exceeds the threshold above.
